name: ExtensionMedicationDispense_BasedOn
title: R5: Plan that is fulfilled by this dispense (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicationDispense.basedOn` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicationDispense.basedOn` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/CarePlan)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicationDispense.basedOn` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/CarePlan)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicationDispense.basedOn` has a context of MedicationDispense based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicationDispense`.
Element `MedicationDispense.basedOn` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: A plan that is fulfilled in whole or in part by this MedicationDispense.
